claim_boundary: Sequence approximation of independent dual-receptor computational Docking geometry; not binding probability, affinity, experimental competition, blocking, Docking Gold, or final submission evidence.

promotion_gate_exact_frozen_amendment.bootstrap: parent resampling with replacement of global Spearman delta
promotion_gate_exact_frozen_amendment.mae: diagnostic only and never a promotion gate

bound_categories: all external content and implementation hashes
outer fold and exact ordered 126-feature schema
backbone kind mode model identity and trust setting
all LoRA parameters and gradient checkpointing
fusion dropout residual scale and pooling mode
all loss weights deltas margins and temperatures
epochs batch parent chunk gradient accumulation
head and LoRA learning rates weight decay warmup clip precision seed
candidate split manifest and observed inner folds
resume_binding.terminal_resume: recompute and verify binding before returning an existing terminal
resume_binding.validation_order: binding rejection occurs before model construction or training
